name: REGENERON PHARMACEUTICALS, INC.
summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a fully integrated biotechnology company that invents, develops, manufactures, and commercializes medicines for serious diseases. Its marketed products include EYLEA HD and EYLEA (aflibercept) for eye diseases, Dupixent (dupilumab) for allergic and inflammatory diseases, Libtayo (cemiplimab) for cancers, Praluent (alirocumab) for cardiovascular risk, Kevzara (sarilumab) for rheumatoid arthritis, and others. The company reported revenues of $14.3 billion in 2024.

products.name: EYLEA HD (aflibercept 8 mg)
products.description: Injectable treatment for wAMD, DME, DR, and RVO approved in the U.S., EU, and Japan.

products.name: EYLEA (aflibercept)
products.description: Injectable treatment for wAMD, DME, DR, RVO, mCNV, NVG, and ROP approved in multiple territories.

products.name: Dupixent (dupilumab)
products.description: Injectable treatment for atopic dermatitis, asthma, CRSwNP, COPD, EoE, prurigo nodularis, CSU, and bullous pemphigoid.

products.name: Libtayo (cemiplimab)
products.description: Injectable treatment for NSCLC, BCC, CSCC, and cervical cancer in the U.S. and EU.

products.name: Praluent (alirocumab)
products.description: Injectable treatment for cardiovascular risk reduction and hypercholesterolemia in the U.S. and EU.

products.name: Kevzara (sarilumab)
products.description: Injectable treatment for rheumatoid arthritis, polymyalgia rheumatica, and pJIA in the U.S., EU, and Japan.

products.name: Evkeeza (evinacumab)
products.description: Injectable treatment for homozygous familial hypercholesterolemia in the U.S., EU, and Japan.

products.name: Ordspono (odronextamab)
products.description: Treatment for follicular lymphoma and diffuse large B-cell lymphoma approved in the U.S.

products.name: Lynozyfic (linvoseltamab)
products.description: Treatment for relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma approved in the U.S. and EU.

products.name: Inmazeb (atoltivimab, maftivimab, odesivimab)
products.description: Injectable treatment for Zaire ebolavirus infection approved in the U.S.

products.name: Veopoz (pozelimab)
products.description: Injectable treatment for CHAPLE disease in patients aged 1 year and older in the U.S.

products.name: ARCALYST (rilonacept)
products.description: Injectable treatment for CAPS, DIRA, and recurrent pericarditis in the U.S.; commercialized by Kiniksa.

products.name: ZALTRAP (ziv-aflibercept)
products.description: Injectable treatment for metastatic colorectal cancer in the U.S., EU, and Japan; commercialized by Sanofi.

partnerships.description: Collaboration for EYLEA and EYLEA HD outside the United States.
Collaboration for Dupixent, Kevzara, and ZALTRAP; Sanofi commercializes Praluent outside the U.S.
Ultragenyx is responsible for development and commercialization of Evkeeza outside the United States.
Kiniksa is responsible for development and commercialization of ARCALYST.
